rules.name: Registration State Machine
rules.description: A registration moves through draft, submitted, then confirmed or waitlisted, and may be cancelled.

rules.name: Event Capacity Enforcement
rules.description: A registration is confirmed only while confirmed registrations are below event capacity; otherwise it is waitlisted.
rules.message: Event is at capacity; registration was waitlisted.

rules.name: One Registration Per Attendee Per Event
rules.description: An attendee may hold at most one non-cancelled registration for a given event.
rules.condition: no existing non-cancelled registration for (eventId, attendeeId)
rules.message: You already have a registration for this event.

rules.name: Only Organizers Publish Events
rules.description: Transitioning an event to published or closed requires the organizer or admin role.
